ksa_text: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

top_anchors.element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-004 (AI, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4086 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.409, nice=0.405, dcwf=0.389) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4086 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-004 (composite 0.4086) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4086 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Market Research Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4086 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4086, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
